content: Curiosity-driven query selection in 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be gated by an online meta-learning consolidation signal that prioritizes storing only high-utility new experiences which do not trigger high catastrophic forgetting risk for existing memory schemas. This creates a self-regulating memory system where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity is balanced against the stability of previously learned knowledge.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
